/* === Variant: single door (390x586, depth 92) === */
/* Generated by BoxForge v1.0 — 6 panes (5 struct, 1 lid, 0 extra) */

.box3d-wrap.single-door-variant {
  --single-door-w: 390px;
  --single-door-h: 586px;
  --box-d: 46px;
  --box-half: -46px;
  --bevel-w: 2px;
  --box-dark: #0a0a08;
  --box-dark2: #000000;
  --box-light: #3a4030;
  --box-floor: #1a1812;
  --box-ceil: #2a3020;
  --box-glow: rgba(220,200,160,0.6);
  --perspective: 502px;
  perspective: 502px;
  width: 390px;
  height: 586px;
}
.box3d-wrap.single-door-variant .box3d-scene {
  width: 390px; height: 586px;
  transform: rotateX(-12deg) rotateY(-21deg);
}
.box3d-wrap.single-door-variant .box3d-spin {
  width: 390px; height: 586px;
}
.single-door-variant .box3d-body {
  width: 390px; height: 586px;
}

/* Back (back): 390 x 586 */
.box3d-wrap.single-door-variant .bf-back {
  width: 390px; height: 586px;
  background: transparent;
  transform: translateZ(-46px) translate(0px,0px);
  display: none;
}
/* Left (left): 92 x 586 */
.box3d-wrap.single-door-variant .bf-left {
  width: 92px; height: 586px;
  left: 149px; top: 0px;
  background: linear-gradient(to top, #0a0a08, #3a4030);
  transform: translate(-180px,7px) rotateY(90deg) translateZ(0px);
}
/* Sub-box: depth 2px */
.box3d-wrap.single-door-variant .bf-left { transform-style: preserve-3d; }
.box3d-wrap.single-door-variant .bf-left > .sub-edge-back {

/* Lid: Door Panel (390x564, hinge: left, open: 92°, hover: 41°) */
.box3d-wrap.single-door-variant .box3d-lid-wrap {
  position: absolute; transform-style: preserve-3d;
  width: 390px; height: 564px;
  left: 0px; top: 11px;
  transform: translateZ(46px) translate(15px,-5px);
}
.box3d-wrap.single-door-variant .box3d-lid {
  width: 390px; height: 564px;
  background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, #3a4030 0px, #3a4030 8px, #1c2212 8px, #1c2212 9px);
  transform-origin: 0px center;
  transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.33, 1, 0.68, 1);
}
.box3d-wrap.single-door-variant.hovered .box3d-lid {
  transform: rotateY(-41deg);
}
.box3d-wrap.single-door-variant.opened .box3d-lid {
  transform: rotateY(-92deg);
}
/* Sub-box: depth 17px */
.box3d-wrap.single-door-variant .box3d-lid { transform-style: preserve-3d; }

/* === GLOW SOURCES (4) === */
.single-door-glow-0 { /* Floor glow */
  position: absolute;
  width: 546px; height: 820px;
  left: calc(50% - 273px + -9px);
  top: calc(50% - 410px + 285px);
  transform: translateZ(0px) rotateX(90deg) rotateY(0deg);
  background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(255,200,80,0.6) 0%, transparent 70%);
  filter: blur(18px);
  pointer-events: none;
}
.single-door-glow-1 { /* Cross glow 1 */
  position: absolute;
  width: 546px; height: 820px;
  left: calc(50% - 273px + 0px);
  top: calc(50% - 410px + 0px);
  transform: translateZ(0px) rotateX(0deg) rotateY(0deg);
  background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(255,200,80,0.6) 0%, transparent 70%);
  filter: blur(18px);
  pointer-events: none;
}
.single-door-glow-2 { /* Cross glow 2 */
  position: absolute;
  width: 347px; height: 522px;
  left: calc(50% - 173.5px + 0px);
  top: calc(50% - 261px + 44px);
  transform: translateZ(-127px) rotateX(0deg) rotateY(60deg);
  background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(255,200,80,0.6) 0%, transparent 70%);
  filter: blur(18px);
  pointer-events: none;
}
.single-door-glow-3 { /* Cross glow 3 */
  position: absolute;
  width: 320px; height: 481px;
  left: calc(50% - 160px + 1px);
  top: calc(50% - 240.5px + -4px);
  transform: translateZ(-186px) rotateX(0deg) rotateY(120deg);
  background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(255,200,80,0.6) 0%, transparent 70%);
  filter: blur(18px);
  pointer-events: none;
}
